steps: File French tax reclaim using Form 5001 with BNP Paribas to recover EUR 3,744.00 excess withholding on TTE dividends
Submit proof of Norwegian tax residency and FR-NO treaty entitlement to 15% rate (vs. applied higher rate)
Request BNP Paribas expedite processing given clear treaty rate documentation for 320,000 TTE shares

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
